questions.text: Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Sony Music and/or Recognition Music.

Outline any concerns regarding the competitive impact of the Acquisition on the supply of music publishing services to artists and songwriters or the commercialisation of music publishing rights in Australia. Are Sony Music and Recognition Music close competitors for either of these services, and what alternatives are available?
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
